content:
RORK — CRITICAL APP NOT LOADING FIX (EXPO GO + APK)

The IVX app is not loading correctly. Stop feature development and perform a root-cause analysis until the app launches successfully.

OBJECTIVE

Fix the application so it reliably opens to the first screen without a black screen, infinite loading, or crash.

ROOT-CAUSE AUDIT

Audit every startup dependency:

1. app/_layout.tsx
2. Expo Router initialization
3. Root providers
4. AuthProvider
5. Supabase initialization
6. Environment variables loading
7. SplashScreen.hideAsync()
8. Font loading
9. AsyncStorage reads
10. SecureStore reads
11. Navigation redirects
12. API requests during startup
13. Owner authentication initialization
14. Realtime subscriptions
15. Global error boundaries
16. Metro/JS bundle errors
17. Native Android logs
18. JavaScript runtime errors

REQUIREMENTS

- The app must never remain on a black screen.
- Add startup timeout protection (maximum 5 seconds).
- If any initialization fails, show a visible error screen instead of hanging.
- Wrap every startup task in try/catch.
- Log the exact failing module and error.
- Do not silently ignore exceptions.
- Do not block the UI waiting for network requests.
- Authentication must initialize asynchronously without freezing the app.

QA

Verify all of the following:

✓ Fresh install
✓ Cold launch
✓ Force stop then reopen
✓ Expo Go
✓ Android APK
✓ Offline startup
✓ Slow network
✓ Logout then reopen
✓ No infinite spinner
✓ No black screen
✓ No startup crash

REQUIRED EVIDENCE

Return:

- Root cause
- File name
- Line number
- Code fix
- GitHub commit SHA
- Build ID
- New APK
- Android logcat showing successful startup
- Screenshot of the first screen after launch
- Confirmation that the app opens in under 5 seconds

Do not say "fixed" until the APK has been tested on a clean Android installation and verified.
